title: S6B_qPCR_let-7_lin-46_timecourse
author: Brunner, Jana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw qPCR data supporting the Fig. S6B.  Expression levels of mature let-7 miRNA (left) and  lin-46  mRNA (right) measured by RT-qPCR in animals grown at 25°C and collected hourly from 12 to 17 hours of development. Expression levels at each time point were first normalized to the levels of a reference gene (small nucleolar RNA sn2841 for let-7, actin mRNA for  lin-46 ) and then to wild type at 12 h.
